ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Report On The Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that there was a sale of the property in Mexico and that there were issues related to the property in Argentinia. No appearance was made by Mr. Vasquez or his Client. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Rudolph Vasquez to appear on November 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to report on status of the Estate. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Report On The Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rudolph Vasquez for Fred Gonzalez.

Mr. Vasquez stated that the two $500.00 bequest have been paid and that he will file proof it. Mr. Vasquez also stated that the Estate portion of the property in Mexico was sold, that the money is in San Francisco, that Argentina did not accept the ancillary proceeding, that he has to qualify his Client as Executor in Argnetina, that there is an issue with his Client's first name (Freddie/Fred), that all documents have been sent to Nicolas Garrini (Attorney in Argentina) and that they are waiting to hear from him. The Court and Mr. Vasquez also discussed amending the inventory to include the cash and filing a Petition for Final Distribution. The status hearing was continued to September 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
